top_signals.title: Rosneft CEO says no country can replace lost Middle East oil
top_signals.summary: No country can quickly replace oil supply lost due to the Middle East crisis, Rosneft Chief Executive Igor Sechin said on Friday. The head of Russia’s state oil company made the statement when discussing the ongoing supply disruptions affecting global oil markets. When asked about the possibility of oil prices climbing to $150 per barrel ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: UK running out of time to boost defense as investment plan stalls, military chief warns
top_signals.summary: Defence Minister John Healey said on Monday that Prime Minister Keir Starmer was determined to publish it before a July 7 NATO summit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto Biz: Nobody told Saylor ‘never sell’
top_signals.summary: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale challenged the “never sell” narrative, while JPMorgan attacked CLARITY and Capital B pursued a huge fundraising plan for BTC.

top_signals.title: Model routing is a fix for AI overspending. That's a problem for OpenAI and Anthropic
top_signals.summary: Companies are shifting from running everything on the most powerful AI model to matching each task to the right one, a practice called model routing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Drillers Continue to Add Oil Rigs
top_signals.summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States rose this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 563, up 4 from this same time last year. The number of active oil rigs rose by 2 to 431 during the latest reporting period, according to the data. This is 11 below this same time last year. The number of gas rigs fell by 1 to 124, which is 10 more than this time last year. The miscellaneous rig stayed the same at 8. The latest EIA data showed that weekly…

top_signals.title: Saylor says Bitcoin needs ‘disciplined expansion’ as analysts weigh demand reset
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor’s essay calls for Bitcoin to expand through banks, credit, securities and higher layers while preserving its base layer.

top_signals.title: Rheinmetall sells struggling auto division to focus on defense
top_signals.summary: The unit will be sold to Aequita for a provisional €350 million, subject to potential adjustment when the deal closes, expected in the fourth quarter.

top_signals.title: Purton to tuck into a weekend winner with Gusto
top_signals.summary: SPARE a thought for 29-year-old local jockey Angus Chung when he arrives at Sha Tin on Sunday. alerts.title: Pump.fun bounty platform pays users to tattoo tokens and chase viral stunts
alerts.summary: Pump.fun launched a new bounty platform where users started funding bizarre memecoin marketing stunts, including forehead tattoos, skydiving as a mascot and setting a vehicle on fire.
